block.name: neurograph_rpc.py: fix peer_bridge NameError at both deposit sites (#184)
acceptance_criteria: _deposit_surfacing_outcome now guards the record_outcome call via getattr(_memory, '_peer_bridge', None)
Self-observation block (line ~992) now assigns peer_bridge via getattr before using it

outputs.name: neurograph_rpc.py
outputs.contract: peer_bridge NameError fixed at both deposit sites

never: Do not edit any vendored file (ng_lite.py, ng_peer_bridge.py, ng_tract_bridge.py, ng_ecosystem.py, ng_autonomic.py, openclaw_adapter.py, ng_embed.py)
Do not modify neuro_foundation.py or openclaw_hook.py
Do not restart any running service
Do not touch any file in NeuroGraph other than neurograph_rpc.py
anti_drift: Only modify the two peer_bridge call sites. Do not refactor, rename, or clean up surrounding code.

steps.description: Check if site1 is already patched — _pb = getattr sentinel
Apply site1 patch only if not already applied

if_true.description: Patch _deposit_surfacing_outcome: wrap peer_bridge.record_outcome with getattr guard

params.command:
python3 << 'PYEOF'
import sys, base64
path = '/home/josh/NeuroGraph/neurograph_rpc.py'
c = open(path, encoding='utf-8').read()
OLD = base64.b64decode('').decode()
NEW = base64.b64decode('').decode()
n = c.count(OLD)
if n != 1:
    print(f'FAILED_SITE1: old_text found {n} times (expected 1)')
    sys.exit(1)
open(path, 'w', encoding='utf-8').write(c.replace(OLD, NEW, 1))
print('PATCHED_SITE1')
PYEOF

steps.description: Confirm peer_bridge = getattr sentinel is now in the file
Verify neurograph_rpc.py compiles clean after patches
Add changelog entry for #184 to neurograph_rpc.py

params.command:
python3 << 'PYEOF'
import sys
path = '/home/josh/NeuroGraph/neurograph_rpc.py'
c = open(path, encoding='utf-8').read()
if 'punchlist #184' in c:
    print('CHANGELOG_ALREADY_PRESENT')
    sys.exit(0)
entry = '# [2026-04-19] Codemine (BLK-NG-184) -- Fix peer_bridge NameError at both deposit sites\n#   What: Added getattr(_memory, \'_peer_bridge\', None) guard at surfacing and self-observation sites\n#   Why:  peer_bridge was never assigned in these scopes (punchlist #184); both deposits were silently\n#          failing inside try/except with NameError. Surfacing and self-obs deposits never actually fired.\n#   How:  Site1 (_deposit_surfacing_outcome): _pb = getattr guard wraps record_outcome call.\n#          Site2 (handle_after_turn): peer_bridge assigned via getattr before if-guard.\n'
OLD_MARKER = '# [2026-04-19] Claude Code — RESTORE:'
if OLD_MARKER not in c:
    print('FAILED: changelog insertion point not found')
    sys.exit(1)
open(path, 'w', encoding='utf-8').write(c.replace(OLD_MARKER, entry + OLD_MARKER, 1))
print('CHANGELOG_ADDED')
PYEOF

steps.description: Commit patched neurograph_rpc.py to NeuroGraph repo

params.command: cd /home/josh/NeuroGraph && git add neurograph_rpc.py && git commit -m 'Fix peer_bridge NameError at both deposit sites (#184)' && git push && echo GIT_DONE

python3 << 'PYEOF'
import sys
path = '/home/josh/docs/punchlist/PUNCHLIST.md'
c = open(path, encoding='utf-8').read()
if '| 184 |' not in c:
    print('FAILED: #184 row not found in punchlist')
    sys.exit(1)
if '**DONE**' in c[c.index('| 184 |'):c.index('| 184 |')+500]:
    print('PUNCHLIST_ALREADY_DONE')
    sys.exit(0)
# Replace trailing | OPEN | with | **DONE** (2026-04-19) |
old_row_suffix = 'or pass it as a parameter. Law 4: fix at the source, not consumer-side patches. | OPEN |'
new_row_suffix = 'or pass it as a parameter. Law 4: fix at the source, not consumer-side patches. **DONE (BLK-NG-184, 2026-04-19):** _pb = getattr guard in _deposit_surfacing_outcome; peer_bridge = getattr assignment in handle_after_turn self-observation block. Both sites now fire correctly. | **DONE** (2026-04-19) |'
if old_row_suffix not in c:
    print('FAILED: expected punchlist row suffix not found')
    sys.exit(1)
open(path, 'w', encoding='utf-8').write(c.replace(old_row_suffix, new_row_suffix, 1))
print('PUNCHLIST_UPDATED')
PYEOF

steps.description: Commit punchlist update to docs repo

params.command: cd /home/josh/docs && git add punchlist/PUNCHLIST.md && git diff --cached --stat && git commit -m '#184 DONE: peer_bridge NameError fix (BLK-NG-184)' && git push && echo DOCS_DONE
